full_text:
Qiao Xuan (Gongzu) 橋玄 (公祖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiao Xuan (橋玄), styledGongzu (公祖), was born in Liang. Recognised Cao Cao’s talent and predicted Han would collapse. Noble offical. Qiao Xuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Qiao Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
